prompt: A cinematic, wide-angle shot of an ancient forest. The left side is lush with massive tree trunks and glowing bioluminescent moss. The right side shows the trees physically dissolving into wisps of dark smoke and fluttering charcoal ash, vanishing into a deep black void. High textural detail, moody atmosphere, blurry motion effect on the disappearing fragments. No text, no graphs. 16:9 aspect ratio, 2048px width.
insight: The world has lost 178 million hectares of forest since 1990, an irreversible evaporation of Earth's primary ecosystems.
